---
name: "Framework Mapping Error"
about: Report an incorrect, outdated, or unsupported framework mapping in a unit
title: "[Mapping] <UNIT CODE> — <short description>"
labels: ["framework: mapping-error"]
assignees: []
---

<!--
Use this for framework mapping problems: a wrong/retired NICE DCWF T-code, a
SFIA level that doesn't fit, an outdated framework version, or a T-code with no
corresponding lab/assessment evidence (an "Employer Visibility" violation — see
docs/content-standards.md section 4).
-->

## Where

- **Unit code & title:**
- **File path and section:** <!-- e.g. OC02, Framework Mappings > NIST NICE DCWF -->

## The mapping in question

- **Framework:** <!-- NICE DCWF / SFIA 9 / ASD CSF / NIST CSF / ISO 27001 / ... -->
- **Element / code as currently written:** <!-- e.g. T0166 -->

## What's wrong

- [ ] Code/element is incorrect or does not exist
- [ ] Code is retired / superseded in a newer framework version
- [ ] Framework version is outdated
- [ ] T-code has no corresponding lab step or assessment (evidence missing)
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Details

<!-- Explain the problem and, if you can, the correct mapping with a source
(e.g. a link to the current NICE/DCWF or SFIA reference). -->

## Suggested correction

<!-- Optional: the corrected element/code and the lab/assessment it should map to. -->
